expectations.text: Generates capital gains as PDF using render-capital-gains.sh with --machine --format json pipe
Uses 2025 date range (2025-01-01T00:00:00Z to 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z) for capital gains
Exports journal entries as CSV using clams reports journal-entries --format csv --output
Generates balance sheet as PDF using render-balance-sheet.sh with --machine --format json pipe
Does not attempt to manually parse or display JSON amounts — uses render scripts for PDFs and --format csv for CSV
expectations.evidence: All formatting handled by render scripts and CSV export. No manual amount parsing.

expectations.text: Produces all three requested outputs: capital gains PDF, journal entries CSV, and balance sheet PDF
expectations.evidence: Three commands produce three files: capital-gains-2025.pdf, journal-entries-2025.csv, balance-sheet-2025.pdf.
